acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.amount: The amount of the asset to be added
params.asset: The asset to be added as liquidity, debt token or pool shares

params.amount: The amount of tokens to be borrowed
params.recipient: The address to receive the borrowed tokens

initialize(address,address[3],address,ui.details: Only factory will call this function once when deploying new market

params.maxXtReserve: The maximum reserve of XT token

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

returns.badDebt: Amount of bad debt if any

params.amount: The amount of the asset to be removed
params.asset: The asset to be removed as liquidity, debt token or pool shares
params.recipient: The address to receive the removed liquidity

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.gtId: The ID of the Gearing Token, which is used to borrow tokens
params.swapTrigger: The callback contract to trigger swaps

params.newPool: The new staking pool to be set, the address(0) can be used to unset the pool

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

params.recipient: The address to receive the withdrawn assets

returns.debtTokenAmount: The amount of debt tokens withdrawn
returns.ftAmount: The amount of FT tokens withdrawn
returns.xtAmount: The amount of XT tokens withdrawn

addLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: Add liquidity to the orderIf you want to add liquidity by ft or xt, please transfer them to the order directly.

apr().notice: Calculate current APR for lending and borrowing

getRealReserves().notice: Get real reserves including assets in pool

initialize((address,address,address,addr.notice: Initialize the order with V2 parameters

initialize(address,address[3],address,ui.notice: Initialize the order with V1 parameters (deprecated)

maker().notice: Get the maker (owner) of the order

market().notice: Return the tokens in TermMax Market

pool().notice: Get the pool address set for the order

redeemAll(address).notice: Redeem all assets and close the order

swapExactTokenToToken(address,address,ad.notice: Swap exact amount of input token for output token

swapTokenToExactToken(address,address,ad.notice: Swap input token for exact amount of output token

tokenReserves().notice: Get the token reserves in the order

updateFeeConfig((uint32,uint32,uint32,ui.notice: This function is disabled and will always revert

updateOrder((((uint256,uint256,int256)[].notice: This function is disabled and will always revert

virtualXtReserve().notice: The virtual xt reserve can present current price, which only changed when swap happens

withdrawAllAssetsBeforeMaturity(address).notice: Withdraw all assets before maturity, only callable by the owner
